'''gohagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzhje|uzhje]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzhje|uzhje]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gohagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohagithi|gohagithi]] || [[word:gohagiji|gohagiji]] || [[word:gohagishi|gohagishi]] || [[word:gohagiki|gohagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohaguthuthu|gohaguthuthu]] || [[word:gohagujuju|gohagujuju]] || [[word:gohagushushu|gohagushushu]] || [[word:gohagukuku|gohagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohaguthu|gohaguthu]] || [[word:gohaguju|gohaguju]] || [[word:gohagushu|gohagushu]] || [[word:gohaguku|gohaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohagufthuf|gohagufthuf]] || [[word:gohagufjuf|gohagufjuf]] || [[word:gohagufshuf|gohagufshuf]] || [[word:gohagufkuf|gohagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohagethe|gohagethe]] || [[word:gohageje|gohageje]] || [[word:gohageshe|gohageshe]] || [[word:gohageke|gohageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohagothotho|gohagothotho]] || [[word:gohagojojo|gohagojojo]] || [[word:gohagoshosho|gohagoshosho]] || [[word:gohagokoko|gohagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohagotho|gohagotho]] || [[word:gohagojo|gohagojo]] || [[word:gohagosho|gohagosho]] || [[word:gohagoko|gohagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohagofthof|gohagofthof]] || [[word:gohagofjof|gohagofjof]] || [[word:gohagofshof|gohagofshof]] || [[word:gohagofkof|gohagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfthĂŻf|gohagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfjĂŻf|gohagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfshĂŻf|gohagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfkĂŻf|gohagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|gohagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|gohagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|gohagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|gohagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfthĂŻf|gohagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfjĂŻf|gohagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfshĂŻf|gohagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfkĂŻf|gohagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfthĂŻf|gohagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfjĂŻf|gohagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfshĂŻf|gohagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:gohagĂŻfkĂŻf|gohagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gohagĂŠthĂŠ|gohagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gohagĂŠjĂŠ|gohagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gohagĂŠshĂŠ|gohagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gohagĂŠkĂŠ|gohagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gohagathatha|gohagathatha]] || [[word:gohagajaja|gohagajaja]] || [[word:gohagashasha|gohagashasha]] || [[word:gohagakaka|gohagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gohagatha|gohagatha]] || [[word:gohagaja|gohagaja]] || [[word:gohagasha|gohagasha]] || [[word:gohagaka|gohagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gohagafthaf|gohagafthaf]] || [[word:gohagafjaf|gohagafjaf]] || [[word:gohagafshaf|gohagafshaf]] || [[word:gohagafkaf|gohagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gohagasha|gohagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohagshĂ«asha|gohagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohagroasha|gohagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohagmuasha|gohagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohagyaasha|gohagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohagnkshĂ«asha|gogohagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohagnkroasha|gogohagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohagnkmuasha|gogohagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohagnkyaasha|gogohagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gohahagasha|gohahagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohahagshĂ«asha|gohahagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohahagroasha|gohahagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohahagmuasha|gohahagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohahagyaasha|gohahagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohahagnkshĂ«asha|gogohahagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohahagnkroasha|gogohahagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohahagnkmuasha|gogohahagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohahagnkyaasha|gogohahagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gehĂŠgasha|gehĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gehĂŠgshĂ«asha|gehĂŠgshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gehĂŠgroasha|gehĂŠgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gehĂŠgmuasha|gehĂŠgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gehĂŠgyaasha|gehĂŠgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogehĂŠgnkshĂ«asha|gogehĂŠgnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogehĂŠgnkroasha|gogehĂŠgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogehĂŠgnkmuasha|gogehĂŠgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogehĂŠgnkyaasha|gogehĂŠgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gohfagasha|gohfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gohfagshĂ«asha|gohfagshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohfagroasha|gohfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohfagmuasha|gohfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohfagyaasha|gohfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogohfagnkshĂ«asha|gogohfagnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogohfagnkroasha|gogohfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogohfagnkmuasha|gogohfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogohfagnkyaasha|gogohfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
